cards.scientific_summary: This 44-residue candidate is anionic, moderately proline-containing, cysteine-rich, low in aromatics, and has balanced hydrophobicity. The computational profile is weak-to-moderately consistent with AMP candidacy, but the signal is tempered by uncalibrated models, absence of validated assay neighbors, and a prominent predicted protease-degradation liability.
